**Which page?**
<!-- e.g. Python Fresh Install, Python Cleanup, Splash Page exercise, feedback page -->

**Which step or section?**
<!-- Be specific — step number, heading title, or describe where on the page -->

**What happened / what's wrong?**
<!-- Describe what you saw, what error you got, or what confused you -->

**What did you expect to happen?**
<!-- What would the correct behavior or content look like? -->

**Your setup (if relevant)**
- Windows version: <!-- e.g. Windows 11 -->
- Python version (if applicable): <!-- e.g. Python 3.12.3 -->
- Browser (if a site display issue): <!-- e.g. Chrome, Edge -->

**Anything else?**
<!-- Screenshots, extra context, suggestions for how to fix it -->
